checklist: 讨论: extract object / action / constraints / deliverable / success criteria first.
规划: check source, artifact, and evidence gates before owner selection.
规划: choose the narrowest domain owner and add at most one overlay.
执行: take the smallest route delta and do not widen the abstraction.
验证: close with tests, commands, screenshots, artifacts, or an explicit blocker.
Completion pressure changes route context only; it must not change selected owner.

scope.policy: session-start required gates plus the curated first-turn owner allowlist; route/search loads fallback manifest when the hot index has no confident hit.

skills: Decide whether work should stay local, use bounded sidecars, or escalate to team orchestration.
Address GitHub PR review comments with gh-source-gate.
Triage and fix failing GitHub Actions PR checks with gh-source-gate.
Inspect Sentry production errors and issue evidence read-only.
Use official OpenAI docs first for current OpenAI guidance
Manage DESIGN.md design-system contracts and visual tokens.
Handle layout-aware Word .docx creation, edits, and review.
Handle layout-aware PDF reading, editing, repair, and review.
Route presentation, PPT, PPTX, and slide deck tasks.
Route workbook-native spreadsheet artifact work before choosing a narrower implementation lane.
Review screenshots and rendered visual artifacts.
Run the local framework autopilot supervisor entrypoint.
Run the safe Git review-fix-tidy-commit-branch-merge-push workflow end to end.
Run the local framework team orchestration entrypoint.
